name: U-channel bracket
description: Base with two flanges. Holes are in the flanges; length runs along X. Prints on the base (flat side down).

parameters.label: Base width
parameters.description: Outer width in Y (includes both flanges and the channel opening).

parameters.label: Left flange height
parameters.description: Height of the left flange above the base (along Z).

parameters.label: Right flange height
parameters.description: Height of the right flange above the base.

parameters.label: Length
parameters.description: Extrusion length of the channel along X.

parameters.label: Hole diameter
parameters.description: Used when "Custom" bolt size is selected.

parameters.label: Holes per flange
parameters.description: Number of through-holes on each flange (same X positions on left and right).

parameters.label: End offset for holes
parameters.description: Inset from each end of the channel for the hole pattern along X.

parameters.label: Countersunk holes
parameters.description: Countersink on the outside of each flange (simplified).

parameters.label: Slotted holes
parameters.description: Vertical slots (along Z) for height adjustment on each flange.

parameters.label: Minimum hole-to-edge
parameters.description: Keeps flange holes away from channel ends.
